description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a bright red metal body and a white plastic or metal handle assembly at the top. The handle features a prominent trigger and a circular pull ring, likely for a safety pin, and is attached to a short nozzle. The body is adorned with a large, white-printed label containing instructions, pictograms, and safety information, which is clearly visible on one side. The extinguisher's surface is smooth and glossy, with a slight taper toward the top and bottom. There are no visible hoses, mounting brackets, or pressure gauges, and the overall design is streamlined for easy handling and operation.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a white handle, trigger, and safety ring, featuring a large instructional label on its body. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible hose or mounting bracket.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the white handle, trigger, and safety ring, as well as the top portion of the label.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the full length of the red cylinder and the white handle, with the label partially visible and no hose or bracket in sight.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the extinguisher is shown, with the label less visible and the smooth, uninterrupted red surface dominating the view.
description_view_3: A clear view of the front, displaying the large white label with text and pictograms, as well as the handle and safety ring assembly.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white label with text and pictograms on the front of the red cylinder, covering a significant portion of the body.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Short, fixed nozzle at the top, integrated with the handle; no hose is visible.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A circular safety ring (pin) is visible at the top, attached to the handle assembly, likely metallic or plastic in appearance.
